creator: michael.glaus@hostpoint.ch
text:
Created attachment 224493
Update to 0.18.0 (not working)

Since varnish got updated to version 6.6 the build fails.

It seems that varnish-modules must be updated to version 0.18.0. 
I tried to update it, but it still fails because there was a change how they handle the docs. 

I have no idea how to properly fix this, so i would be glad if someone could help.

The patch in the attachments is only for the versions update and the build still fails.
